features.details: Review issue #115 in the repository to understand what the automation was attempting to do when it failed. Document the expected behavior and any relevant context.
features.notes: Investigation complete. Error is AttributeError on PullRequest.head attribute. See investigation_report_T001.md for details.

features.description: Locate the automation code with the bug
features.details: Find the source code that processes issues and accesses PullRequest objects. Search for '.head' attribute access patterns in the codebase to identify the exact location of the error.
Review the GitHub API client library documentation (likely PyGithub or similar) to determine the correct way to access pull request head information. Document the correct attribute access pattern.

features.description: Fix the PullRequest attribute access bug
features.details: Update the automation code to correctly access the head information from PullRequest objects. This may involve changing attribute names or using method calls instead of direct attribute access.

features.description: Add defensive error handling for PullRequest operations
features.details: Implement try-catch blocks and validation checks around PullRequest attribute access to provide better error messages and prevent similar failures in the future.

features.description: Add unit tests for PullRequest handling
features.details: Create unit tests that verify correct handling of PullRequest objects, including edge cases where attributes may be missing or have different structures.
After fixing the bug, manually trigger re-processing of issue #115 or handle it manually. Then close issue #117 with a summary of the fix applied.

overall_approach: 1) Investigate the original issue #115 to understand the automation's intent, 2) Locate and examine the automation code that's failing, 3) Identify the correct API/library usage for accessing PullRequest head information, 4) Implement the fix with proper error handling, 5) Test and close the meta-issue.
potential_risks: The automation code may have multiple similar attribute access bugs that need fixing
The GitHub API client library version may affect attribute naming conventions
Issue #115 may have specific conditions that triggered this edge case
Fixing this may reveal other underlying issues in the automation workflow
